summary: Phase 6 check-warning for 4 services. 1/4 WARNING_DISPLAYED (github_copilot). 2/4 BLOCK_ONLY (huggingface silent-fail, deepseek network-error). 1/4 NEEDS_LOGIN (v0 requires sign-in to submit).

huggingface.notes: Conversation UUID created (69e03561a03b0afe5db68eb5) but COMPLETE SILENT FAIL — no user message bubble, no assistant response, no error UI. Identical to #454 silent-fail pattern. APF blocked the request but NDJSON template was not rendered by SvelteKit chat-ui. Input cleared back to placeholder.

deepseek.notes: User message bubble displayed correctly. Assistant area shows generic network error: '네트워크를 확인하고 다시 시도하세요.' (Check your network and try again). This is DeepSeek's built-in i18n error message, NOT the APF warning template. The SSE template was not rendered as warning text.

github_copilot.warning_text_exact: ⚠ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
github_copilot.notes: SUCCESS! User message 'My SSN is 123456-1234567. Reply in one sentence.' displayed. Assistant bubble shows APF warning: '⚠ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' with thumbs up/down, copy, retry buttons. Warning rendered inline as chat response via SSE template. Model was Claude Haiku 4.5.

v0.notes: v0.dev now requires sign-in to submit prompts. Text was pasted into input field but send button did not trigger submission for unauthenticated users. URL redirected from v0.dev to v0.app/chat. The request specified login_required=false but this has changed since the original probe (#447). Cannot test APF warning without authenticated session.

overall_summary.best_result: github_copilot — full warning text rendered in chat bubble
overall_summary.worst_result: huggingface — complete silent fail, no UI feedback at all
overall_summary.recommendation: GitHub Copilot SSE template is working correctly. DeepSeek and HuggingFace templates need different delivery mechanisms — current templates produce silent fail or generic network error instead of rendering warning text. v0 needs re-test with authenticated session.
